_comment: shopId comes from a Shopee shop URL: shopee.ph/shopname.<shopId> — open a shop page and check the URL or Network tab (v4/shop/get response has 'shopid'). categoryId is optional, used to filter a shop's own listing by category.

shops.name: Example PC Shop 1
shops.note: replace with real shopId, e.g. from PCHub/DynaQuest/EasyPC storefront URL

keywordSearches.note: matchId is Shopee's category filter id, leave null to search all categories
